    WHERE MRAT.APPLICATION = 'SW'
) 
SELECT TECHNICAL_ID, ASSET_TYPE 
FROM CTE 
WHERE rn = 1

WITH match_dates AS (
    SELECT 
        m.country_id, 
        m.date, 
        m.league_id, 
        m.season, 
        DENSE_RANK() OVER (PARTITION BY m.country_id ORDER BY m.date DESC) AS match_rank 
    FROM "Match" AS m 
    WHERE m.date IS NOT NULL
), 
country_stats AS (
    SELECT 
        c.id AS country_id, 
        c.name AS country_name, 
        COUNT(DISTINCT m.league_id) AS league_count, 
        COUNT(DISTINCT m.season) AS season_count 
    FROM "Country" AS c 
    LEFT JOIN "Match" AS m ON c.id = m.country_id 
    GROUP BY c.id, c.name
), 
sorted_leagues AS (
    SELECT 
        md.country_id, 
        md.date, 
        md.match_rank, 
        md.league_id, 
        l.name AS league_name 
    FROM match_dates AS md 
    JOIN "League" AS l ON md.league_id = l.id 
    WHERE md.match_rank <= 2 
    ORDER BY md.country_id, md.date DESC, md.match_rank, l.name
), 
match_summary AS (
    SELECT 
        country_id, 
        date, 
        match_rank, 
        GROUP_CONCAT(league_name, ', ') AS leagues_played 
    FROM sorted_leagues 
    GROUP BY country_id, date, match_rank
) 
SELECT 
    cs.country_id, 
    cs.country_name, 
    MAX(CASE WHEN ms.match_rank = 1 THEN ms.date END) AS last_match_date, 
    MAX(CASE WHEN ms.match_rank = 1 THEN ms.leagues_played END) AS last_match_leagues, 
    MAX(CASE WHEN ms.match_rank = 2 THEN ms.date END) AS prev_match_date, 
    MAX(CASE WHEN ms.match_rank = 2 THEN ms.leagues_played END) AS prev_match_leagues, 
    cs.league_count, 
    cs.season_count 
FROM country_stats AS cs 
LEFT JOIN match_summary AS ms ON cs.country_id = ms.country_id 
GROUP BY cs.country_id, cs.country_name, cs.league_count, cs.season_count 
HAVING MAX(CASE WHEN ms.match_rank = 1 THEN ms.date END) IS NOT NULL 
ORDER BY last_match_date DESC

WITH ranges AS (
    SELECT DATE('2014-01-01') AS valid_from, DATE('2014-01-31') AS valid_until
    UNION ALL
    SELECT DATE('2014-02-01') AS valid_from, DATE('2014-02-28') AS valid_until
),
events AS (
    -- Start events: +1 to count
    SELECT valid_from AS dt, 1 AS delta FROM ranges
    UNION ALL
    -- End events: -1 from count (day after end date, since end date is inclusive)
    SELECT DATE(valid_until, '+1 day') AS dt, -1 AS delta FROM ranges
),
ordered_events AS (
    SELECT dt, SUM(delta) AS delta
    FROM events
    GROUP BY dt
),
running_counts AS (
    SELECT 
        dt,
        SUM(delta) OVER (ORDER BY dt ROWS UNBOUNDED PRECEDING) AS count
    FROM ordered_events
),
periods AS (
    SELECT 
        dt AS valid_from,
        LEAD(dt) OVER (ORDER BY dt) AS next_dt,
        count
    FROM running_counts
)
SELECT 
    valid_from,
    CASE 
        WHEN next_dt IS NULL THEN NULL
        ELSE DATE(next_dt, '-1 day')
    END AS valid_until,
    count
FROM periods
WHERE count > 0
AND (next_dt IS NULL OR valid_from <= DATE(next_dt, '-1 day'))

WITH school_data AS (
    SELECT 
        s.cdscode AS pk, 
        CASE 
            WHEN s.charter = 1 THEN 'Charter' 
            WHEN s.magnet = 1 THEN 'Magnet' 
            ELSE 'Regular' 
        END AS col2, 
        SUBSTR(s.county, 1, CASE WHEN INSTR(s.county, ' ') > 0 THEN INSTR(s.county, ' ') - 1 ELSE LENGTH(s.county) END) AS col3, 
        datetime('2024-09-04 ' || printf('%02d:%02d:00', (ROW_NUMBER() OVER (ORDER BY s.cdscode)) % 24, ((ROW_NUMBER() OVER (ORDER BY s.cdscode)) * 7) % 60)) AS col4 
    FROM schools AS s 
    WHERE s.statustype = 'Active' AND s.lastupdate IS NOT NULL
), 
filtered_data AS (
    SELECT 
        sd.pk, 
        sd.col2, 
        sd.col3, 
        sd.col4 
    FROM school_data AS sd 
    WHERE sd.col4 >= datetime('2024-09-04 00:00:00') 
      AND sd.col4 < datetime('2024-09-04 00:05:00')
) 
SELECT 
    col2, 
    GROUP_CONCAT(DISTINCT col3, ', ') AS col3 
FROM filtered_data 
GROUP BY col2

WITH "data" AS (
    SELECT 101 AS "id", 'A' AS "type", 10 AS "part" 
    UNION ALL 
    SELECT 101 AS "id", 'B' AS "type", 10 AS "part" 
    UNION ALL 
    SELECT 101 AS "id", 'B' AS "type", 10 AS "part" 
    UNION ALL 
    SELECT 101 AS "id", 'B' AS "type", 20 AS "part" 
    UNION ALL 
    SELECT 101 AS "id", 'C' AS "type", 30 AS "part" 
    UNION ALL 
    SELECT 102 AS "id", 'A' AS "type", 10 AS "part" 
    UNION ALL 
    SELECT 102 AS "id", 'B' AS "type", 25 AS "part" 
    UNION ALL 
    SELECT 103 AS "id", 'A' AS "type", 25 AS "part" 
    UNION ALL 
    SELECT 103 AS "id", 'B' AS "type", 25 AS "part"
), 
"w_cnt" AS (
    SELECT "id", "part", COUNT(*) AS "cnt" 
    FROM "data" 
    GROUP BY "id", "part" 
    HAVING COUNT(*) > 1
) 
SELECT d."id", d."type", d."part" 
FROM "data" AS d 
INNER JOIN "w_cnt" AS w 
    ON d."id" = w."id" 
    AND d."part" = w."part"

    MAX(CASE WHEN name = 'statustype' THEN 'YES' ELSE 'NO' END) AS statustype,
    MAX(CASE WHEN name = 'school' THEN 'YES' ELSE 'NO' END) AS school

WITH RECURSIVE 
string1_split(value, rest) AS (
    SELECT '', '24,36,78,98' || ',' 
    UNION ALL 
    SELECT SUBSTR(rest, 1, INSTR(rest, ',') - 1), SUBSTR(rest, INSTR(rest, ',') + 1) 
    FROM string1_split 
    WHERE rest != ''
),
string1_values AS (
    SELECT TRIM(value) AS value 
    FROM string1_split 
    WHERE value != ''
),
string2_split(value, rest) AS (
    SELECT '', '25,36,88,98' || ',' 
    UNION ALL 
    SELECT SUBSTR(rest, 1, INSTR(rest, ',') - 1), SUBSTR(rest, INSTR(rest, ',') + 1) 
    FROM string2_split 
    WHERE rest != ''
),
string2_values AS (
    SELECT TRIM(value) AS value 
    FROM string2_split 
    WHERE value != ''
)
SELECT s1.value 
FROM string1_values s1 
JOIN string2_values s2 ON s1.value = s2.value
JULIANDAY('now') - JULIANDAY(STRFTIME('%Y-%m-%d', "date"))

    MAX(
        date(date('now', 'start of month'), '+' || m.months || ' months'),
        date('now')
    ) AS bond_formation_date

CROSS JOIN (
    SELECT 0 AS months 
    UNION SELECT 1 
    UNION SELECT 2 
    UNION SELECT 3 
    UNION SELECT 4 
    UNION SELECT 5
) AS m 
WHERE b.molecule_id = 'TR011'

SELECT m.id, m.date, m.home_team_api_id, m.away_team_api_id, m.home_team_goal, m.away_team_goal 
FROM Match AS m 
INNER JOIN Team_Attributes AS ta ON m.home_team_api_id = ta.team_api_id 
WHERE ta.buildUpPlaySpeed IS NOT NULL 
AND ta.buildUpPlaySpeed > (SELECT AVG(buildUpPlaySpeed) FROM Team_Attributes WHERE buildUpPlaySpeed IS NOT NULL) 
ORDER BY m.home_team_goal DESC

SELECT 
    team_api_id,
    SUM(CASE WHEN substr(date, 1, 4) = '2011' THEN defencePressure ELSE 0 END) AS defensive_pressure_2011,
    SUM(CASE WHEN substr(date, 1, 4) = '2011' THEN buildUpPlaySpeed ELSE 0 END) AS build_up_speed_2011,
    SUM(CASE WHEN substr(date, 1, 4) = '2012' THEN defencePressure ELSE 0 END) AS defensive_pressure_2012,
    SUM(CASE WHEN substr(date, 1, 4) = '2012' THEN buildUpPlaySpeed ELSE 0 END) AS build_up_speed_2012
FROM Team_Attributes
WHERE substr(date, 1, 4) IN ('2011', '2012')
GROUP BY team_api_id
HAVING defensive_pressure_2011 IS NOT NULL 
    OR defensive_pressure_2012 IS NOT NULL 
    OR build_up_speed_2011 IS NOT NULL 
    OR build_up_speed_2012 IS NOT NULL
ORDER BY team_api_id

SELECT 
    "id", 
    "date", 
    "home_team_goal", 
    LAG("home_team_goal") OVER (ORDER BY "date" ASC, "id" ASC) AS prev_home_goal 
FROM "Match" 
WHERE "date" <= '2024-02-26'
ORDER BY "date" ASC, "id" ASC

SELECT 
    atom_id,
    MAX(CASE WHEN rn = 1 THEN bond_id END) AS bond_id_1,
    MAX(CASE WHEN rn = 2 THEN bond_id END) AS bond_id_2,
    MAX(CASE WHEN rn = 3 THEN bond_id END) AS bond_id_3
FROM (
    SELECT 
        atom_id,
        bond_id,
        ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY atom_id ORDER BY bond_id) AS rn
    FROM connected
    WHERE bond_id IS NOT NULL
) ranked
WHERE rn <= 3
GROUP BY atom_id
ORDER BY atom_id

WITH OrderedCategories AS (
    SELECT 
        SUM(spent) AS category_total, 
        category 
    FROM budget 
    GROUP BY category 
    ORDER BY category DESC
), 
Cumulative AS (
    SELECT 
        category_total, 
        category, 
        SUM(category_total) OVER (ORDER BY category DESC) AS cumulative_sum
    FROM OrderedCategories
) 
SELECT 
    category_total, 
    category 
FROM Cumulative 
WHERE cumulative_sum <= 800

WITH match_times AS (
    SELECT 
        match_id,
        match_date,
        DATE(match_date) AS match_date_only,
        CAST(STRFTIME('%H', match_date) AS REAL) + CAST(STRFTIME('%M', match_date) AS REAL) / 60.0 AS hour_of_day
    FROM detail
    WHERE match_date IS NOT NULL
),
target_times AS (
    SELECT 8 AS target_hour, 'morning' AS time_period
    UNION ALL 
    SELECT 20 AS target_hour, 'evening' AS time_period
),
distance_calc AS (
    SELECT 
        mt.match_id,
        mt.match_date,
        mt.match_date_only,
        tt.target_hour,
        tt.time_period,
        ABS(mt.hour_of_day - tt.target_hour) AS time_distance,
        ROW_NUMBER() OVER (
            PARTITION BY mt.match_date_only, tt.target_hour 
            ORDER BY ABS(mt.hour_of_day - tt.target_hour), mt.match_date
        ) AS time_rank
    FROM match_times AS mt 
    CROSS JOIN target_times AS tt
)
SELECT

WITH my_table AS (
    SELECT 'A' AS cto, 1 AS nif, 'A1' AS file_, 5 AS filesize UNION ALL 
    SELECT 'A', 1, 'A2', 3 UNION ALL 
    SELECT 'A', 2, 'A3', 2 UNION ALL 
    SELECT 'A', 2, 'A4', 1 UNION ALL 
    SELECT 'B', 1, 'B1', 4 UNION ALL 
    SELECT 'B', 1, 'B2', 6
),
-- First, get row numbers and calculate group sizes for each nif within each cto
numbered AS (
    SELECT *,
        ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY cto ORDER BY file_) AS rn,
        SUM(filesize) OVER (PARTITION BY cto, nif) AS nif_total_size,
        COUNT(*) OVER (PARTITION BY cto, nif) AS nif_count
    FROM my_table
),
-- Identify where nif groups start
group_starts AS (
    SELECT *,
        CASE WHEN LAG(nif) OVER (PARTITION BY cto ORDER BY file_) IS DISTINCT FROM nif THEN 1 ELSE 0 END AS is_new_nif_group
    FROM numbered
),
-- Assign group numbers within each category
group_numbered AS (
    SELECT *,
        SUM(is_new_nif_group) OVER (PARTITION BY cto ORDER BY file_) AS nif_group_num
    FROM group_starts
),
-- Get the total size of each nif group (take first row's value for each group)
group_sizes AS (
    SELECT *,
        FIRST_VALUE(nif_total_size) OVER (PARTITION BY cto, nif_group_num ORDER BY file_) AS current_group_size
    FROM group_numbered
),
-- Calculate running totals and lookahead logic for partitioning
partition_calc AS (
    SELECT *,
        -- Running sum of group sizes (reset at partition boundaries)
        SUM(current_group_size) OVER (PARTITION BY cto ORDER BY nif_group_num 
            ROWS BETWEEN UNBOUNDED PRECEDING AND CURRENT ROW) AS running_group_sum,
        -- Lead to check next group's size
        LEAD(current_group_size) OVER (PARTITION BY cto ORDER BY nif_group_num) AS next_group_size,
        -- Count items in current partition
        SUM(nif_count) OVER (PARTITION BY cto ORDER BY nif_group_num 
            ROWS BETWEEN UNBOUNDED PRECEDING AND CURRENT ROW) AS running_item_count,
        LEAD(nif_count) OVER (PARTITION BY cto ORDER BY nif_group_num) AS next_group_items
    FROM group_sizes
),
-- Determine partition boundaries based on constraints:
-- 1. Adding next group would exceed size 10, OR
-- 2. Adding next group would exceed 7 items
partition_markers AS (
    SELECT *,
        CASE 
            WHEN next_group_size IS NULL THEN 0  -- Last group
            WHEN running_group_sum + next_group_size > 10 THEN 1  -- Size would exceed 10
            WHEN running_item_count + COALESCE(next_group_items, 0) > 7 THEN 1  -- Items would exceed 7
            ELSE 0 
        END AS is_partition_boundary
    FROM partition_calc
),
-- Assign final partition numbers
final_partitions AS (
    SELECT *,
        SUM(is_partition_boundary) OVER (PARTITION BY cto ORDER BY nif_group_num) + 1 AS partition_num
    FROM partition_markers
),
-- Calculate subpartition (row number within partition) and total partition size
final_calc AS (
    SELECT cto, nif, file_, filesize,
        partition_num,
        ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY cto, partition_num ORDER BY file_) AS subpartition,
        SUM(filesize) OVER (PARTITION BY cto, partition_num) AS total_partition_size
    FROM final_partitions
)
SELECT cto, nif, file_, partition_num AS partition, subpartition, total_partition_size
FROM final_calc
ORDER BY cto, file_

WITH RECURSIVE "a" AS (
    SELECT 'Jack|Sparrow|17-09-16|DY7009|Address at some where|details' AS "test" 
    UNION ALL 
    SELECT 'Jack|Sparrow|17-09-16|DY7009|' 
    UNION ALL 
    SELECT 'Jack|Sparrow|17-09-16'
)
SELECT 
    "test",
    CASE 
        -- 0 pipes: return whole string
        WHEN INSTR("test", '|') = 0 THEN "test"
        -- Find position after 4th pipe (start of 5th value), or end of string
        ELSE SUBSTRING("test" FROM 1 FOR 
            CASE 
                -- Count pipes by replacing and comparing lengths
                WHEN LENGTH("test") - LENGTH(REPLACE("test", '|', '')) < 4 THEN LENGTH("test")
                ELSE (
                    -- Position of 1st pipe
                    INSTR("test", '|') +
                    -- Position of 2nd pipe (relative to 1st)
                    INSTR(SUBSTRING("test" FROM INSTR("test", '|') + 1), '|') +
                    -- Position of 3rd pipe (relative to 2nd)
                    INSTR(SUBSTRING("test" FROM INSTR("test", '|') + INSTR(SUBSTRING("test" FROM INSTR("test", '|') + 1), '|') + 1), '|') +
                    -- Position of 4th pipe (relative to 3rd)
                    INSTR(SUBSTRING("test" FROM INSTR("test", '|') + INSTR(SUBSTRING("test" FROM INSTR("test", '|') + 1), '|') + INSTR(SUBSTRING("test" FROM INSTR("test", '|') + INSTR(SUBSTRING("test" FROM INSTR("test", '|') + 1), '|') + 1), '|') + 1), '|') +
                    -- Position of 5th pipe (relative to 4th), minus 1 to exclude it
                    INSTR(SUBSTRING("test" FROM INSTR("test", '|') + INSTR(SUBSTRING("test" FROM INSTR("test", '|') + 1), '|') + INSTR(SUBSTRING("test" FROM INSTR("test", '|') + INSTR(SUBSTRING("test" FROM INSTR("test", '|') + 1), '|') + 1), '|') + INSTR(SUBSTRING("test" FROM INSTR("test", '|') + INSTR(SUBSTRING("test" FROM INSTR("test", '|') + 1), '|') + INSTR(SUBSTRING("test" FROM INSTR("test", '|') + INSTR(SUBSTRING("test" FROM INSTR("test", '|') + 1), '|') + 1), '|') + 1), '|') + 1), '|') - 1
                )
            END
        )
    END AS "res"
FROM "a"

WITH player_date_ranges AS (
    SELECT 
        player_fifa_api_id AS id,
        MIN(DATE(date)) AS first_date,
        MAX(DATE(date)) AS last_date
    FROM player_attributes
    GROUP BY player_fifa_api_id
),
gaps AS (
    -- Calculate 'Before First Date' gap
    SELECT 
        id,
        'Before First Date' AS gap_type,
        first_date AS relevant_date,
        CASE 
            WHEN first_date > '2000-01-01' 
            THEN JULIANDAY(first_date) - JULIANDAY('2000-01-01')
            ELSE NULL
        END AS days_gap
    FROM player_date_ranges
    
    UNION ALL
    
    -- Calculate 'After Last Date' gap
    SELECT 
        id,
        'After Last Date' AS gap_type,
        last_date AS relevant_date,
        CASE 
            WHEN last_date < '2025-12-31' 
            THEN JULIANDAY('2025-12-31') - JULIANDAY(last_date)
            ELSE NULL
        END AS days_gap
    FROM player_date_ranges
)
SELECT 
    id,
    gap_type,
    relevant_date,
    CAST(days_gap AS INTEGER) AS days_gap
FROM gaps
WHERE days_gap IS NOT NULL
ORDER BY id, gap_type

    FROM atom

WITH RECURSIVE molecule_atoms_recursive AS (
    -- Anchor member: start with atom_number = 1 for each molecule
    SELECT 
        molecule_id, 
        1 AS atom_number, 
        atom_count 
    FROM (
        SELECT 
            molecule_id, 
            COUNT(atom_id) AS atom_count 
        FROM atom 
        GROUP BY molecule_id
    ) AS base
    UNION ALL
    -- Recursive member: increment atom_number, but only while it's less than atom_count
    SELECT 
        mar.molecule_id, 
        mar.atom_number + 1, 
        mar.atom_count 
    FROM molecule_atoms_recursive AS mar
    WHERE mar.atom_number < mar.atom_count  -- This stops the recursion
)
SELECT 
    molecule_id, 
    atom_number 
FROM molecule_atoms_recursive
ORDER BY molecule_id, atom_number

WITH

           CAST(SUBSTR(version, 1, INSTR(version, '.') - 1) AS INTEGER) as v1,
           SUBSTR(version, INSTR(version, '.') + 1) as rest
    FROM cars
),
minor AS (
    SELECT version, v1,
           CAST(SUBSTR(rest, 1, INSTR(rest, '.') - 1) AS INTEGER) as v2,
           SUBSTR(rest, INSTR(rest, '.') + 1) as rest
    FROM major
),
patch AS (
    SELECT version, v1, v2,
           CAST(SUBSTR(rest, 1, INSTR(rest || '-', '-') - 1) AS INTEGER) as v3,
           CASE WHEN INSTR(rest, '-') > 0 THEN SUBSTR(rest, INSTR(rest, '-') + 1) ELSE NULL END as rest
    FROM minor
),
build AS (
    SELECT version, v1, v2, v3,
           CAST(CASE WHEN rest IS NOT NULL 
                THEN SUBSTR(rest, 1, INSTR(rest || '-', '-') - 1) 
                ELSE '0' END AS INTEGER) as v4
    FROM patch
)
SELECT version 
FROM build 
ORDER BY v1 DESC, v2 DESC, v3 DESC, v4 DESC

INSERT INTO groups (ROOM_GUID, USER_GUID, joined_at, is_admin, permissions, last_activity, membership_status, notes, invitation_code, notification_level, custom_data)
SELECT 
    l_missing.GUID AS ROOM_GUID,
    g_existing.USER_GUID,
    CURRENT_TIMESTAMP AS joined_at,
    0 AS is_admin,
    '{"read": true}' AS permissions,
    NULL AS last_activity,
    'active' AS membership_status,
    'Auto-added duplicate resolution' AS notes,
    NULL AS invitation_code,
    1 AS notification_level,
    0.00 AS custom_data
FROM login l_missing
INNER JOIN login l_existing 
    ON l_missing.LOGIN = l_existing.LOGIN 
    AND l_missing.NAME = l_existing.NAME 
    AND l_missing.GUID != l_existing.GUID
INNER JOIN groups g_existing 
    ON l_existing.GUID = g_existing.ROOM_GUID
WHERE 
    (l_missing.LOGIN, l_missing.NAME) IN (
        SELECT LOGIN, NAME 
        FROM login 
        GROUP BY LOGIN, NAME 
        HAVING COUNT(*) > 1
    )
    AND l_missing.GUID NOT IN (SELECT ROOM_GUID FROM groups)
    AND l_existing.GUID IN (SELECT ROOM_GUID FROM groups)

    NULLIF(MAX(CASE WHEN "element" LIKE '%_highgrade' THEN "record" END), 0) AS "record"

GROUP BY SUBSTR("element", 1, INSTR("element", '_') - 1)

    SELECT atom_id AS connected_atom, COUNT(*) AS cnt FROM connected GROUP BY atom_id
    UNION ALL
    SELECT atom_id2 AS connected_atom, COUNT(*) AS cnt FROM connected WHERE atom_id != atom_id2 GROUP BY atom_id2
)
SELECT 
    ta.atom_id,
    a.molecule_id,
    a.element,
    COALESCE(SUM(cc.cnt), 0) AS connection_count
FROM target_atoms ta

GROUP BY ta.atom_id, a.molecule_id, a.element

top_3 AS (
    SELECT name, Prints FROM ranked_items WHERE rn <= 3
),
others_total AS (
    SELECT 
        'Others' AS name, 
        SUM(Prints) AS Prints 
    FROM ranked_items 
    WHERE rn > 3
)
SELECT name, Prints FROM top_3
UNION ALL
SELECT name, Prints FROM others_total
ORDER BY 
    CASE WHEN name = 'Others' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END,
    Prints DESC

SELECT

    GROUP_CONCAT(driverId) OVER (ORDER BY points ASC ROWS BETWEEN UNBOUNDED PRECEDING AND UNBOUNDED FOLLOWING) AS "group_concat(driverId) with order full partition", 
    GROUP_CONCAT(driverId) OVER (ORDER BY points ASC) AS "group_concat(driverId) with order default frame", 
    LEAD(driverId) OVER () AS "lead(driverId) without order", 
    GROUP_CONCAT(driverId) OVER () AS "group_concat(driverId) without order" 
FROM results 
WHERE raceId = 19

LEFT JOIN connected AS c ON a1.atom_id = c.atom_id AND a2.atom_id = c.atom_id2

WITH with_last_non_null AS (
    SELECT 
        ID,
        DATE,
        GOT,
        MAX(CASE WHEN GOT IS NOT NULL THEN DATE END) OVER (
            PARTITION BY ID 
            ORDER BY DATE 
            ROWS UNBOUNDED PRECEDING
        ) AS last_non_null_date
    FROM laboratory
)
SELECT 
    w.ID,
    w.DATE,
    w.GOT AS original_got,
    COALESCE(w.GOT, l.GOT) AS NEW_GOT
FROM with_last_non_null w
LEFT JOIN laboratory l 
    ON w.ID = l.ID 
    AND w.last_non_null_date = l.DATE
ORDER BY w.ID, w.DATE

WITH PatientExamData AS (
    SELECT 
        P.ID AS PATIENTID, 
        P.SEX, 
        P.BIRTHDAY, 
        E."Examination Date", 
        E.DIAGNOSIS, 
        E.THROMBOSIS, 
        ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY P.ID ORDER BY E."Examination Date") AS ExamRank 
    FROM patient AS P 
    LEFT JOIN examination AS E ON P.ID = E.ID
), 
LatestLabResults AS (
    SELECT 
        L.ID, 
        L.PLT, 
        L.WBC, 
        ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY L.ID ORDER BY L."date" DESC) AS LabRank 
    FROM laboratory AS L 
    WHERE L."date" <= CURRENT_TIMESTAMP
), 
PatientRiskProfile AS (
    SELECT 
        PED.PATIENTID, 
        PED.SEX, 
        PED.BIRTHDAY, 
        PED."Examination Date", 
        PED.DIAGNOSIS, 
        PED.THROMBOSIS, 
        CASE 
            WHEN LLR.PLT < 150 OR LLR.WBC > 11 THEN 'High' 
            WHEN PED.THROMBOSIS IS NULL THEN 'Unknown' 
            ELSE 'Normal' 
        END AS RiskCategory 
    FROM patientexamdata AS PED 
    LEFT JOIN latestlabresults AS LLR ON PED.PATIENTID = LLR.ID AND LLR.LabRank = 1
) 
SELECT 
    PATIENTID, 
    SEX, 
    BIRTHDAY, 
    COUNT("Examination Date") AS EXAMINATIONCOUNT, 
    SUM(CASE WHEN THROMBOSIS = 1 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS THROMBOSISCOUNT, 
    SUM(CASE WHEN THROMBOSIS = 0 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS NOTHROMBOSISCOUNT, 
    MAX(CASE WHEN RiskCategory = 'High' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS HighRiskFlag 
FROM patientriskprofile 
GROUP BY PATIENTID, SEX, BIRTHDAY 
HAVING COUNT("Examination Date") > 0 
ORDER BY SUM(CASE WHEN THROMBOSIS = 1 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) DESC, PATIENTID

WITH ranked_schools AS (

        ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY county ORDER BY cdscode ASC) AS rnk
    FROM schools
),
odd_schools AS (
    SELECT county, cdscode, rnk
    FROM ranked_schools
    WHERE rnk % 2 = 1
),
even_schools AS (
    SELECT county, cdscode, rnk
    FROM ranked_schools
    WHERE rnk % 2 = 0
)
SELECT 
    o.cdscode AS cdscode1,
    o.county AS county1,
    e.cdscode AS cdscode2,
    e.county AS county2
FROM odd_schools o

ORDER BY o.county, o.rnk

WITH RaceResults AS (
    SELECT 
        r.raceId, 
        r.year, 
        r.name AS raceName, 
        res.positionText, 
        d.forename || ' ' || d.surname AS driverName, 
        res.driverId
    FROM results AS res 
    INNER JOIN races AS r ON res.raceId = r.raceId 
    INNER JOIN drivers AS d ON res.driverId = d.driverId 
    WHERE res.positionText IN ('1', '2', '3')
)
SELECT 
    rr.raceId, 
    MAX(rr.year) AS year, 
    MAX(rr.raceName) AS raceName, 
    MAX(CASE WHEN rr.positionText = '1' THEN rr.driverName END) AS position1_driver,
    MAX(CASE WHEN rr.positionText = '1' THEN rr.driverId END) AS position1,
    MAX(CASE WHEN rr.positionText = '2' THEN rr.driverName END) AS position2_driver,
    MAX(CASE WHEN rr.positionText = '2' THEN rr.driverId END) AS position2,
    MAX(CASE WHEN rr.positionText = '3' THEN rr.driverName END) AS position3_driver,
    MAX(CASE WHEN rr.positionText = '3' THEN rr.driverId END) AS position3
FROM RaceResults AS rr
GROUP BY rr.raceId
ORDER BY MAX(rr.year) DESC, rr.raceId

WITH status_counts AS (
    SELECT 
        r.driverId,
        r.statusId,
        COUNT(*) as status_count,
        ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY r.driverId ORDER BY COUNT(*) DESC) as rn
    FROM results r
    GROUP BY r.driverId, r.statusId
)
SELECT 
    d.driverId,
    d.forename || ' ' || d.surname as driver_name,
    s.status as most_common_status,
    sc.status_count as occurrence_count
FROM status_counts sc
JOIN drivers d ON sc.driverId = d.driverId
JOIN status s ON sc.statusId = s.statusId
WHERE sc.rn = 1
ORDER BY d.surname, d.forename

WITH DriverGroups AS (
    SELECT 
        CASE 
            WHEN nationality IS NULL THEN 'Unknown' 
            ELSE nationality 
        END AS driver_group, 
        code 
    FROM drivers 
    WHERE code IS NOT NULL
), 
GroupedCodes AS (
    SELECT 
        driver_group, 
        MIN(code) AS min_code, 
        MAX(code) AS max_code, 
        COUNT(DISTINCT code) AS distinct_code_count 
    FROM DriverGroups 
    GROUP BY driver_group
) 
SELECT 
    driver_group, 
    CASE 
        WHEN distinct_code_count > 1 THEN min_code || '-' || max_code
        ELSE max_code 
    END AS concat_codes 
FROM GroupedCodes 
ORDER BY driver_group

)

WITH TeamAverages AS (
    SELECT 
        AVG(CAST(buildUpPlaySpeed AS REAL)) AS AvgBuildUpPlaySpeed, 
        AVG(CAST(defenceTeamWidth AS REAL)) AS AvgDefenceTeamWidth 
    FROM Team_Attributes 
    WHERE buildUpPlaySpeed IS NOT NULL 
      AND defenceTeamWidth IS NOT NULL
) 
SELECT 
    TA.id, 
    TA.buildUpPlaySpeed, 
    TA.buildUpPlayPassing, 
    TA.chanceCreationPassing, 
    TA.chanceCreationCrossing, 
    TA.chanceCreationShooting, 
    TA.defencePressure, 
    TA.defenceAggression, 
    TA.defenceTeamWidth 
FROM Team_Attributes AS TA
CROSS JOIN TeamAverages
WHERE TA.buildUpPlaySpeed > TeamAverages.AvgBuildUpPlaySpeed 
  AND TA.defenceTeamWidth < TeamAverages.AvgDefenceTeamWidth 
ORDER BY TA.buildUpPlaySpeed DESC, TA.defenceTeamWidth ASC

WITH TeamRecords AS (
    SELECT 
        id,
        team_api_id,
        date,
        buildUpPlaySpeed,
        buildUpPlayPassing,
        defenceTeamWidth,
        chanceCreationShooting,
        -- Get next record's values (forward look)
        LEAD(buildUpPlaySpeed) OVER (PARTITION BY team_api_id ORDER BY date) AS next_buildUpPlaySpeed,
        LEAD(buildUpPlayPassing) OVER (PARTITION BY team_api_id ORDER BY date) AS next_buildUpPlayPassing,
        -- Get previous record's values (backward look)
        LAG(defenceTeamWidth) OVER (PARTITION BY team_api_id ORDER BY date) AS prev_defenceTeamWidth,
        LAG(chanceCreationShooting) OVER (PARTITION BY team_api_id ORDER BY date) AS prev_chanceCreationShooting,
        -- Count records per team for filtering
        COUNT(*) OVER (PARTITION BY team_api_id) AS team_record_count
    FROM Team_Attributes
    WHERE buildUpPlaySpeed IS NOT NULL 
      AND defenceTeamWidth IS NOT NULL
)
SELECT 
    id,
    team_api_id,
    date,
    buildUpPlaySpeed,
    buildUpPlayPassing,
    next_buildUpPlaySpeed,
    next_buildUpPlayPassing,
    defenceTeamWidth,
    chanceCreationShooting,
    prev_defenceTeamWidth,
    prev_chanceCreationShooting
FROM TeamRecords
WHERE team_record_count > 1
  AND prev_defenceTeamWidth > buildUpPlaySpeed
ORDER BY team_api_id, date

SELECT

            'atoms', COALESCE(a.atoms, '[]'),

        )
    ) AS groupedMolecules
FROM molecule m
LEFT JOIN (
    SELECT 
        molecule_id,
        JSON_GROUP_ARRAY(JSON_OBJECT('atom_id', atom_id, 'element', element)) AS atoms
    FROM atom
    GROUP BY molecule_id
) a ON m.molecule_id = a.molecule_id
LEFT JOIN (
    SELECT 
        molecule_id,
        JSON_GROUP_ARRAY(JSON_OBJECT('bond_id', bond_id, 'bond_type', bond_type)) AS bonds
    FROM bond
    GROUP BY molecule_id
) b ON m.molecule_id = b.molecule_id
GROUP BY m.label

WITH PLAYERATTRS AS (
    SELECT 
        OVERALL_RATING AS PLAYER_VALUE, 
        ROW_NUMBER() OVER (ORDER BY OVERALL_RATING DESC) AS RN 
    FROM player_attributes
),
TEAMATTRS AS (
    SELECT 
        BUILDUPPLAYSPEED AS TEAM_VALUE, 
        ROW_NUMBER() OVER (ORDER BY BUILDUPPLAYSPEED DESC) AS RN 
    FROM team_attributes
)
SELECT 
    P.RN AS RANK_POSITION,
    P.PLAYER_VALUE AS PLAYER_OVERALL_RATING,
    T.TEAM_VALUE AS TEAM_BUILDUP_SPEED
FROM PLAYERATTRS P
LEFT JOIN TEAMATTRS T ON P.RN = T.RN

UNION ALL

SELECT 
    T.RN AS RANK_POSITION,
    P.PLAYER_VALUE AS PLAYER_OVERALL_RATING,
    T.TEAM_VALUE AS TEAM_BUILDUP_SPEED
FROM TEAMATTRS T
LEFT JOIN PLAYERATTRS P ON T.RN = P.RN
WHERE P.RN IS NULL

ORDER BY RANK_POSITION

WITH CardLegalities AS (

    WHERE l.format IN ('commander', 'duel', 'legacy')
), 
LegalityStats AS (
    SELECT 
        card_name, 
        format, 
        MAX(CASE WHEN status = 'Legal' THEN id END) AS legal_id, 
        MAX(CASE WHEN status = 'Banned' THEN id END) AS banned_id 
    FROM CardLegalities 
    GROUP BY card_name, format
) 
SELECT 
    ls.card_name, 
    ls.format, 
    ls.legal_id, 
    ls.banned_id, 
    (COALESCE(ls.legal_id, 0) - COALESCE(ls.banned_id, 0)) AS id_diff 
FROM LegalityStats AS ls 
WHERE ls.legal_id IS NOT NULL OR ls.banned_id IS NOT NULL 
ORDER BY ls.card_name ASC, ls.format ASC

WITH pages AS (
    SELECT 1 AS page_id, 1 AS power_id UNION ALL 
    SELECT 1, 7 UNION ALL 
    SELECT 2, 1 UNION ALL 
    SELECT 3, 1 UNION ALL 
    SELECT 3, 7 UNION ALL 
    SELECT 3, 89 UNION ALL 
    SELECT 4, 20 UNION ALL 
    SELECT 5, 55 UNION ALL 
    SELECT 5, 1 UNION ALL 
    SELECT 6, 1 UNION ALL 
    SELECT 6, 13
), 
items AS (
    SELECT 10 AS hero_id, 1 AS power_id UNION ALL 
    SELECT 10, 7 UNION ALL 
    SELECT 10, 20 UNION ALL 
    SELECT 12, 1 UNION ALL 
    SELECT 12, 55
),
page_power_counts AS (
    SELECT page_id, COUNT(*) AS total_powers 
    FROM pages 
    GROUP BY page_id
),
hero_page_matches AS (
    SELECT 
        p.page_id,
        i.hero_id,
        COUNT(DISTINCT p.power_id) AS matched_powers
    FROM pages AS p
    INNER JOIN items AS i ON p.power_id = i.power_id
    GROUP BY p.page_id, i.hero_id
)
SELECT 
    hpm.page_id, 
    hpm.hero_id
FROM hero_page_matches AS hpm
INNER JOIN page_power_counts AS ppc ON hpm.page_id = ppc.page_id
WHERE hpm.matched_powers = ppc.total_powers

WITH data AS (
    SELECT 
        p.id, 
        p."First Date" AS as_of_date, 
        p.diagnosis AS current_diagnosis,
        LAG(p.diagnosis) OVER (PARTITION BY p.id ORDER BY p."First Date") AS prev_diagnosis
    FROM patient AS p
),
changes AS (
    SELECT 
        id,
        as_of_date,
        current_diagnosis,
        prev_diagnosis,
        CASE 
            WHEN current_diagnosis IN ('RA susp.', 'PSS', 'SLE') 
                 AND (prev_diagnosis IS NULL OR current_diagnosis <> prev_diagnosis)
            THEN 1 
            ELSE 0 
        END AS is_target_change
    FROM data
)
SELECT 
    id,
    as_of_date,
    current_diagnosis,
    prev_diagnosis
FROM changes
WHERE is_target_change = 1
QUALIFY ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY id ORDER BY as_of_date) = 1

WITH hero_activity AS (
    SELECT 1 as id, '2023-01-01' as activity_date, 10 as activity_value, 1 as hero_id 
    UNION ALL SELECT 2, '2023-01-02', 20, 1 
    UNION ALL SELECT 3, '2023-02-01', 15, 1 
    UNION ALL SELECT 4, '2023-02-02', 25, 1 
    UNION ALL SELECT 5, '2023-01-03', 30, 2 
    UNION ALL SELECT 6, '2023-02-03', 40, 2
),
monthly_totals AS (
    -- Calculate total for each month
    SELECT 
        strftime('%Y-%m', activity_date) as month_key,
        SUM(activity_value) as month_total
    FROM hero_activity
    GROUP BY strftime('%Y-%m', activity_date)
),
activity_with_months AS (
    -- Add month key to each activity
    SELECT 
        id,
        activity_date,
        activity_value,
        strftime('%Y-%m', activity_date) as month_key,
        DATE(activity_date, 'start of month') as month_start
    FROM hero_activity
),
activity_totals AS (
    SELECT 
        a.id,
        a.activity_date,
        a.activity_value,
        -- Running total across all records
        SUM(a.activity_value) OVER (ORDER BY a.activity_date) AS run_tot,
        -- Running total within each month
        SUM(a.activity_value) OVER (PARTITION BY a.month_key ORDER BY a.activity_date) AS m_run_tot,
        -- Previous month's total (the key fix!)
        COALESCE(
            LAG(mt.month_total) OVER (ORDER BY a.month_start),
            0
        ) AS prev_m_tot
    FROM activity_with_months a
    LEFT JOIN monthly_totals mt ON a.month_key = mt.month_key
)
SELECT 
    id, 
    activity_date, 
    activity_value, 
    run_tot, 
    m_run_tot, 
    prev_m_tot AS required_output 
FROM activity_totals
ORDER BY activity_date

WITH monthly_last_exam AS (
    SELECT 
        id,
        "Examination Date",
        thrombosis,
        strftime('%Y-%m', "Examination Date") AS year_month,
        ROW_NUMBER() OVER (
            PARTITION BY id, strftime('%Y-%m', "Examination Date") 
            ORDER BY "Examination Date" DESC
        ) AS rn
    FROM examination
),
filtered_monthly AS (
    SELECT 
        id,
        "Examination Date",
        thrombosis,
        year_month
    FROM monthly_last_exam
    WHERE rn = 1
),
with_previous AS (
    SELECT 
        f.id,
        f.year_month,
        f."Examination Date",
        f.thrombosis AS current_thrombosis,
        (
            SELECT e2.thrombosis
            FROM examination e2
            WHERE e2.id = f.id 
              AND e2."Examination Date" < f."Examination Date"
            ORDER BY e2."Examination Date" DESC
            LIMIT 1
        ) AS previous_thrombosis
    FROM filtered_monthly f
)
SELECT 
    id,
    year_month || '-01' AS startofmonth,
    CASE 
        WHEN previous_thrombosis IS NULL THEN 'N/A'
        WHEN previous_thrombosis < current_thrombosis THEN 'Yes' 
        ELSE 'No' 
    END AS increase_risk,
    CASE 
        WHEN previous_thrombosis IS NULL THEN 'N/A'
        WHEN previous_thrombosis > current_thrombosis THEN 'Yes' 
        ELSE 'No' 
    END AS decrease_risk
FROM with_previous
ORDER BY id, year_month

WITH KEYWORDMATCHES AS (
    SELECT 
        P.ID, 
        CASE WHEN INSTR(LOWER(P.PLAYER_NAME), LOWER('Aaron')) > 0 THEN 'Aaron' END AS COLAKEYWORD, 
        CASE WHEN INSTR(LOWER(P.PLAYER_NAME), LOWER('Cresswell')) > 0 THEN 'Cresswell' END AS COLBKEYWORD, 
        CASE WHEN INSTR(LOWER(P.PLAYER_NAME), LOWER('Doran')) > 0 THEN 'Doran' END AS COLCKEYWORD 
    FROM PLAYER AS P
), 
KEYWORDSCORES AS (
    SELECT 
        ID, 
        GROUP_CONCAT(COLAKEYWORD, ', ') FILTER(WHERE NOT COLAKEYWORD IS NULL) AS KEYWORDSA, 
        GROUP_CONCAT(COLBKEYWORD, ', ') FILTER(WHERE NOT COLBKEYWORD IS NULL) AS KEYWORDSB, 
        GROUP_CONCAT(COLCKEYWORD, ', ') FILTER(WHERE NOT COLCKEYWORD IS NULL) AS KEYWORDSC, 
        SUM(CASE WHEN NOT COLAKEYWORD IS NULL THEN 10 ELSE 0 END) AS COLASCORE, 
        SUM(CASE WHEN NOT COLBKEYWORD IS NULL THEN 5 ELSE 0 END) AS COLBSCORE, 
        SUM(CASE WHEN NOT COLCKEYWORD IS NULL THEN 0.1 ELSE 0 END) AS COLCSCORE 
    FROM KEYWORDMATCHES AS KM 
    GROUP BY ID
) 
SELECT DISTINCT 
    P.ID, 
    P.PLAYER_NAME AS DESCRIPTION, 
    (KS.COLASCORE + KS.COLBSCORE + KS.COLCSCORE) AS SCORE 
FROM PLAYER AS P 
INNER JOIN KEYWORDSCORES AS KS ON P.ID = KS.ID 
ORDER BY SCORE DESC

WITH t AS (
    SELECT e.*, 
           ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY e.id ORDER BY e."Examination Date") AS seqnum 
    FROM examination AS e
), 
cte AS (
    -- Base case: first examination for each patient
    SELECT t.id, 
           t."Examination Date" AS startdate, 
           t.seqnum, 
           'N' AS isrehire, 
           t."Examination Date" AS anchordate 
    FROM t 
    WHERE t.seqnum = 1
    
    UNION ALL
    
    -- Recursive case: subsequent examinations
    SELECT t.id, 
           t."Examination Date" AS startdate, 
           t.seqnum, 
           CASE 
               WHEN t."Examination Date" > date(cte.anchordate, '+1 year') 
               THEN 'Y' 
               ELSE 'N' 
           END AS isrehire, 
           CASE 
               WHEN t."Examination Date" > date(cte.anchordate, '+1 year') 
               THEN t."Examination Date" 
               ELSE cte.anchordate 
           END AS anchordate 
    FROM cte 
    INNER JOIN t ON cte.id = t.id AND t.seqnum = cte.seqnum + 1
) 
SELECT id, startdate, seqnum, isrehire 
FROM cte 
ORDER BY id, startdate

WITH RECURSIVE 
-- First, get all unique dates from both tables to create interval boundaries
all_dates AS (
    SELECT start_date AS dt FROM account_activity
    UNION
    SELECT end_date FROM account_activity
    UNION
    SELECT start_date FROM blackout_periods
    UNION
    SELECT end_date FROM blackout_periods
),
-- Create ordered list of unique dates
ordered_dates AS (
    SELECT dt, ROW_NUMBER() OVER (ORDER BY dt) AS rn
    FROM all_dates
),
-- Create small intervals between consecutive dates
intervals AS (
    SELECT 
        d1.dt AS s,
        d2.dt AS e
    FROM ordered_dates d1
    JOIN ordered_dates d2 ON d1.rn + 1 = d2.rn
    WHERE d1.dt < d2.dt
),
-- Merge overlapping blackout periods first
blackout_merged AS (
    SELECT 
        start_date,
        end_date,
        MAX(end_date) OVER (ORDER BY start_date ROWS BETWEEN UNBOUNDED PRECEDING AND 1 PRECEDING) AS prev_end
    FROM blackout_periods
),
blackout_ranges AS (
    SELECT 
        start_date,
        end_date,
        CASE 
            WHEN prev_end IS NULL OR start_date > prev_end THEN 1 
            ELSE 0 
        END AS is_new_group
    FROM blackout_merged
),
blackout_groups AS (
    SELECT 
        start_date,
        end_date,
        SUM(is_new_group) OVER (ORDER BY start_date) AS grp
    FROM blackout_ranges
),
merged_blackouts AS (
    SELECT 
        MIN(start_date) AS start_date,
        MAX(end_date) AS end_date
    FROM blackout_groups
    GROUP BY grp
),
-- Find intervals that overlap with active periods but not with any merged blackout
active_intervals AS (
    SELECT i.s, i.e
    FROM intervals i
    WHERE EXISTS (
        -- Must overlap with at least one active period
        SELECT 1 FROM account_activity a
        WHERE i.s < a.end_date AND i.e > a.start_date
    )
    AND NOT EXISTS (
        -- Must NOT overlap with any merged blackout period
        SELECT 1 FROM merged_blackouts b
        WHERE i.s < b.end_date AND i.e > b.start_date
    )
)
SELECT s AS start_date, e AS end_date FROM active_intervals
ORDER BY s

WITH RECURSIVE CTE_RN AS (
    SELECT e.exp_id, e.mid, e.qty, i.qty AS LimitQty, 
           ROW_NUMBER() OVER (ORDER BY e.exp_id) AS rn 
    FROM Experiment AS e 
    INNER JOIN Inventory AS i ON e.mid = i.mid 
    WHERE e.mid = 2
), 
CTE_Recursive AS (
    -- Base case: first experiment
    SELECT r.exp_id, r.mid, r.qty, r.LimitQty, r.rn, 
           CASE WHEN r.qty <= r.LimitQty THEN r.qty ELSE 0 END AS ConsumedQty, 
           CASE WHEN r.qty <= r.LimitQty THEN 1 ELSE 0 END AS Executable,
           CASE WHEN r.qty <= r.LimitQty THEN r.LimitQty - r.qty ELSE r.LimitQty END AS RemainingQty
    FROM CTE_RN AS r 
    WHERE r.rn = 1 
    
    UNION ALL 
    
    -- Recursive case: subsequent experiments
    SELECT r.exp_id, r.mid, r.qty, r.LimitQty, r.rn, 
           CASE WHEN r.qty <= rec.RemainingQty THEN r.qty ELSE 0 END AS ConsumedQty, 
           CASE WHEN r.qty <= rec.RemainingQty THEN 1 ELSE 0 END AS Executable,
           CASE WHEN r.qty <= rec.RemainingQty THEN rec.RemainingQty - r.qty ELSE rec.RemainingQty END AS RemainingQty
    FROM CTE_RN AS r 
    INNER JOIN CTE_Recursive AS rec ON rec.rn + 1 = r.rn
) 
SELECT exp_id, mid, Executable 
FROM CTE_Recursive 
ORDER BY rn

WITH RECURSIVE vt AS (
    SELECT t.*, 
           ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY CustomerID ORDER BY StartDate, TransactionID) AS seqnum 
    FROM transactions_1k AS t
), 
cte AS (
    -- Base case: first transaction for each customer
    SELECT vt.TransactionID, 
           vt.CustomerID, 
           vt.StartDate, 
           vt.EndDate, 
           vt.EndDate AS last_unflagged_end_date,  -- Track end date of last unflagged transaction
           0 AS flag,  -- First transaction is always unflagged
           seqnum 
    FROM vt 
    WHERE seqnum = 1
    
    UNION ALL
    
    -- Recursive case: subsequent transactions
    SELECT vt.TransactionID, 
           vt.CustomerID, 
           vt.StartDate, 
           vt.EndDate,
           -- Update last_unflagged_end_date only if current transaction is unflagged
           CASE 
               WHEN vt.StartDate > date(cte.last_unflagged_end_date, '+90 days') 
               THEN vt.EndDate 
               ELSE cte.last_unflagged_end_date 
           END AS last_unflagged_end_date,
           -- Flag is 1 if within 90 days of last unflagged end date, else 0
           CASE 
               WHEN vt.StartDate > date(cte.last_unflagged_end_date, '+90 days') 
               THEN 0 
               ELSE 1 
           END AS flag,
           vt.seqnum 
    FROM cte 
    JOIN vt ON vt.seqnum = cte.seqnum + 1 AND vt.CustomerID = cte.CustomerID
)
SELECT cte.TransactionID, 
       cte.CustomerID, 
       cte.StartDate, 
       cte.EndDate, 
       cte.flag 
FROM cte 
ORDER BY cte.CustomerID, cte.StartDate, cte.TransactionID

WITH RECURSIVE cte AS (
    -- Anchor: start with the specific IDs, preserving the original starting ID
    SELECT 
        id AS start_id,
        id,
        bossid,
        1 AS level
    FROM staff 
    WHERE id IN (657266, 115562)
    
    UNION ALL
    
    -- Recursive: follow the bossid chain upward
    SELECT 
        c.start_id,
        s.id,
        s.bossid,
        c.level + 1
    FROM staff AS s 
    JOIN cte AS c ON s.id = c.bossid
    WHERE c.bossid IS NOT NULL
)
-- Select only the ultimate root for each starting record
-- (the record with the highest level, i.e., deepest in the hierarchy)
SELECT 
    start_id,
    id AS ultimate_root_id
FROM cte c1
WHERE level = (
    SELECT MAX(level) 
    FROM cte c2 
    WHERE c2.start_id = c1.start_id
)

WITH LastPerStation AS (
    SELECT *,
        ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY customerid, gasstationid ORDER BY transaction_time DESC) as rn
    FROM transactions_1k
),
Filtered AS (
    SELECT * FROM LastPerStation WHERE rn = 1
),
CustomerStatus AS (
    SELECT 
        customerid,
        EXISTS(SELECT 1 FROM Filtered f2 WHERE f2.customerid = Filtered.customerid AND f2.amount < 10) as has_issue
    FROM Filtered
    GROUP BY customerid
),
Ranked AS (
    SELECT 
        f.*,
        cs.has_issue,
        ROW_NUMBER() OVER (
            PARTITION BY f.customerid 
            ORDER BY 
                CASE WHEN cs.has_issue AND f.amount < 10 THEN f.transaction_time END ASC NULLS LAST,
                CASE WHEN NOT cs.has_issue THEN f.transaction_time END DESC NULLS LAST
        ) as rk
    FROM Filtered f
    JOIN CustomerStatus cs ON f.customerid = cs.customerid
    WHERE (cs.has_issue AND f.amount < 10) OR (NOT cs.has_issue AND f.amount >= 10)
)

FROM Ranked
WHERE rk = 1

WITH RECURSIVE 
-- Get all refs and their associated usernames
all_refs AS (
    SELECT ref1 AS ref, username FROM users WHERE ref1 IS NOT NULL
    UNION ALL
    SELECT ref2 AS ref, username FROM users WHERE ref2 IS NOT NULL
),
-- Build connections: which usernames share at least one ref
connections AS (
    SELECT DISTINCT a1.username AS u1, a2.username AS u2
    FROM all_refs a1
    JOIN all_refs a2 ON a1.ref = a2.ref AND a1.username != a2.username
),
-- Find connected components using recursive CTE
-- Each user starts in their own group (represented by min username in component)
groups AS (
    SELECT username, username AS group_rep FROM users
    UNION
    SELECT g.username, c.u2 AS group_rep
    FROM groups g
    JOIN connections c ON g.group_rep = c.u1
),
-- Get canonical group id for each user
user_groups AS (
    SELECT username, MIN(group_rep) AS group_id
    FROM groups
    GROUP BY username
),
-- All distinct group ids
all_groups AS (
    SELECT DISTINCT group_id FROM user_groups
),
-- For each group, get comma-separated usernames
group_info AS (
    SELECT 
        ag.group_id,
        GROUP_CONCAT(DISTINCT ug.username) AS usernames
    FROM all_groups ag
    LEFT JOIN user_groups ug ON ag.group_id = ug.group_id
    GROUP BY ag.group_id
),
-- Count assets per group (owner matches any username in group)
group_asset_counts AS (
    SELECT 
        gi.group_id,
        gi.usernames,
        COUNT(DISTINCT a.id) AS asset_count,
        GROUP_CONCAT(DISTINCT a.id) AS asset_ids
    FROM group_info gi
    LEFT JOIN assets a ON a.owner IN (
        SELECT username FROM user_groups WHERE group_id = gi.group_id
    )
    GROUP BY gi.group_id, gi.usernames
),
-- Missing entries: asset owners not in users table
missing_owners AS (
    SELECT 
        a.owner AS group_id,
        a.owner AS usernames,
        COUNT(DISTINCT a.id) AS asset_count,
        GROUP_CONCAT(DISTINCT a.id) AS asset_ids,
        a.owner AS ref2
    FROM assets a
    LEFT JOIN users u ON a.owner = u.username
    WHERE u.username IS NULL
    GROUP BY a.owner
)
-- Combine results
SELECT 
    group_id,
    usernames,
    asset_count,
    asset_ids,
    NULL AS ref2
FROM group_asset_counts

UNION ALL

SELECT 
    group_id,
    usernames,
    asset_count,
    asset_ids,
    ref2
FROM missing_owners

ORDER BY group_id

WITH RECURSIVE 
ordered AS (
    SELECT 
        entity_id,
        updated_at,
        MAX(CASE WHEN column_id = 'height' THEN CAST(value AS INTEGER) END) AS height_val,
        MAX(CASE WHEN column_id = 'weight' THEN CAST(value AS INTEGER) END) AS weight_val,
        ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY entity_id ORDER BY updated_at) AS rn
    FROM player_stats_changes
    WHERE column_id IN ('height', 'weight')
    GROUP BY entity_id, updated_at
),
cumulative AS (
    -- Base case: first row for each entity
    SELECT 
        entity_id,
        updated_at,
        height_val AS height,
        weight_val AS weight,
        rn
    FROM ordered
    WHERE rn = 1
    
    UNION ALL
    
    -- Recursive case: carry forward non-null values
    SELECT 
        o.entity_id,
        o.updated_at,
        COALESCE(o.height_val, c.height) AS height,
        COALESCE(o.weight_val, c.weight) AS weight,
        o.rn
    FROM ordered o
    JOIN cumulative c ON o.entity_id = c.entity_id AND o.rn = c.rn + 1
)
SELECT entity_id, updated_at, height, weight
FROM cumulative
ORDER BY entity_id, updated_at

WITH RECURSIVE
qr1 AS (
    SELECT id, subgroup1 AS subgroup 
    FROM superhero_group 
    WHERE subgroup1 IS NOT NULL
), 
qr2 AS (
    SELECT id, subgroup2 AS subgroup 
    FROM superhero_group 
    WHERE subgroup2 IS NOT NULL
), 
combined AS (
    SELECT id, subgroup FROM qr1 
    UNION 
    SELECT id, subgroup FROM qr2
),
-- Build adjacency list through shared subgroups
neighbors AS (
    SELECT DISTINCT c1.id AS node, c2.id AS neighbor
    FROM combined c1
    JOIN combined c2 ON c1.subgroup = c2.subgroup AND c1.id != c2.id
),
-- Recursive traversal to find connected components
transitive_closure(node, root, depth) AS (
    -- Base: start from each node, itself as root
    SELECT DISTINCT id AS node, id AS root, 0 AS depth
    FROM combined
    
    UNION ALL
    
    -- Recursive: follow neighbors, keep minimum root
    SELECT 
        n.neighbor AS node,
        MIN(tc.root, n.neighbor) AS root,
        tc.depth + 1
    FROM transitive_closure tc
    JOIN neighbors n ON tc.node = n.node
    WHERE tc.depth < 100  -- prevent infinite loops
),
-- Get minimum root for each node (its group representative)
group_assignments AS (
    SELECT node AS id, MIN(root) AS group_id
    FROM transitive_closure
    GROUP BY node
)
SELECT 
    sg.id,
    COALESCE(ga.group_id, sg.id) AS group_id
FROM superhero_group sg
LEFT JOIN group_assignments ga ON sg.id = ga.id
ORDER BY sg.id

WITH RECURSIVE 
token_extraction(id, original_text, pos, current_token, all_tokens, token_num) AS (
    SELECT 
        id,
        text,
        INSTR(text, '{{'),
        CASE 
            WHEN INSTR(text, '{{') > 0 
            THEN SUBSTR(text, INSTR(text, '{{'), INSTR(text, '}}', INSTR(text, '{{')) - INSTR(text, '{{') + 2)
            ELSE NULL 
        END,
        CASE 
            WHEN INSTR(text, '{{') > 0 
            THEN SUBSTR(text, INSTR(text, '{{'), INSTR(text, '}}', INSTR(text, '{{')) - INSTR(text, '{{') + 2)
            ELSE '' 
        END,
        CASE WHEN INSTR(text, '{{') > 0 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END
    FROM cards
    WHERE text LIKE '%{{%}}%'
    
    UNION ALL
    
    SELECT 
        id,
        original_text,
        INSTR(SUBSTR(original_text, pos + LENGTH(current_token)), '{{'),
        CASE 
            WHEN INSTR(SUBSTR(original_text, pos + LENGTH(current_token)), '{{') > 0
            THEN SUBSTR(
                SUBSTR(original_text, pos + LENGTH(current_token)),
                INSTR(SUBSTR(original_text, pos + LENGTH(current_token)), '{{'),
                INSTR(SUBSTR(original_text, pos + LENGTH(current_token)), '}}') - INSTR(SUBSTR(original_text, pos + LENGTH(current_token)), '{{') + 2
            )
            ELSE NULL 
        END,
        all_tokens || ', ' || CASE 
            WHEN INSTR(SUBSTR(original_text, pos + LENGTH(current_token)), '{{') > 0
            THEN SUBSTR(
                SUBSTR(original_text, pos + LENGTH(current_token)),
                INSTR(SUBSTR(original_text, pos + LENGTH(current_token)), '{{'),
                INSTR(SUBSTR(original_text, pos + LENGTH(current_token)), '}}') - INSTR(SUBSTR(original_text, pos + LENGTH(current_token)), '{{') + 2
            )
            ELSE '' 
        END,
        token_num + 1
    FROM token_extraction
    WHERE INSTR(SUBSTR(original_text, pos + LENGTH(current_token)), '{{') > 0
)
SELECT 
    id,
    original_text AS text,
    all_tokens AS bracketed_tokens,
    token_num AS token_count
FROM token_extraction
WHERE current_token IS NULL OR INSTR(SUBSTR(original_text, pos + LENGTH(current_token)), '{{') = 0
ORDER BY id

    r.total_points,
    r.race_points,
    r.raceId
FROM racers r
JOIN driver_rankings dr ON r.id = dr.id AND r.name = dr.name AND r.total_points = dr.total_points
ORDER BY dr.place, r.id, r.raceId

SELECT 
    o.month_year,
    COUNT(DISTINCT o.customer_id) AS repeat_customer_count
FROM orders o
WHERE EXISTS (
    SELECT 1 
    FROM orders o2 
    WHERE o2.customer_id = o.customer_id 
    AND o2.month_year < o.month_year
)
GROUP BY o.month_year
ORDER BY o.month_year

SELECT client.gender, loan.loan_amount, loan.loan_term_months, account.date 
FROM loan 
JOIN account ON loan.account_id = account.account_id 
JOIN disp ON account.account_id = disp.account_id 
JOIN client ON disp.client_id = client.client_id 
WHERE loan.application_date BETWEEN '1996-01-01' AND '1996-12-31'

WITH view_starts AS (
    SELECT session_id, post_id, ts AS start_time
    FROM view_logs
    WHERE event_name = 'view_start'
),
view_ends AS (
    SELECT session_id, post_id, ts AS end_time, view_perc
    FROM view_logs
    WHERE event_name = 'view_end'
),
paired_views AS (
    SELECT 
        s.session_id,
        s.post_id,
        s.start_time,
        MIN(e.end_time) AS end_time,
        MAX(e.view_perc) AS view_perc
    FROM view_starts s
    JOIN view_ends e 
        ON s.session_id = e.session_id 
        AND s.post_id = e.post_id 
        AND e.end_time > s.start_time
    GROUP BY s.session_id, s.post_id, s.start_time
)
SELECT 
    session_id,
    post_id,
    start_time,
    end_time,
    CASE 
        WHEN (end_time - start_time > 3 AND view_perc > 0.8) 
        THEN 1 
        ELSE 0 
    END AS has_impact
FROM paired_views

WITH deleted AS (
    DELETE FROM superhero WHERE id = 999 RETURNING id
)
SELECT COALESCE(MAX(id), 0) AS result FROM deleted

WITH numbered AS (
    SELECT 
        id,
        superhero_name,
        full_name,
        gender_id,
        eye_colour_id,
        hair_colour_id,
        skin_colour_id,
        race_id,
        publisher_id,
        alignment_id,
        height_cm,
        weight_kg,
        total_powers,
        description,
        ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY publisher_id ORDER BY id) as rn,
        SUM(CASE WHEN height_cm IS NOT NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) OVER (PARTITION BY publisher_id ORDER BY id ROWS BETWEEN UNBOUNDED PRECEDING AND CURRENT ROW) as height_grp,
        SUM(CASE WHEN weight_kg IS NOT NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) OVER (PARTITION BY publisher_id ORDER BY id ROWS BETWEEN UNBOUNDED PRECEDING AND CURRENT ROW) as weight_grp
    FROM superhero
),
filled AS (
    SELECT 
        id,
        superhero_name,
        full_name,
        gender_id,
        eye_colour_id,
        hair_colour_id,
        skin_colour_id,
        race_id,
        publisher_id,
        alignment_id,
        MAX(height_cm) OVER (PARTITION BY publisher_id, height_grp ORDER BY id) as height_cm_filled,
        MAX(weight_kg) OVER (PARTITION BY publisher_id, weight_grp ORDER BY id) as weight_kg_filled,
        total_powers,
        description
    FROM numbered
)
SELECT 
    id,
    superhero_name,
    full_name,
    gender_id,
    eye_colour_id,
    hair_colour_id,
    skin_colour_id,
    race_id,
    publisher_id,
    alignment_id,
    height_cm_filled as height_cm,
    weight_kg_filled as weight_kg,
    total_powers,
    description
FROM filled
ORDER BY publisher_id, id

SELECT 
    SUM(CASE WHEN DATE(timestamp) = DATE('2022-01-27', '-1 day') THEN amount ELSE 0 END) AS yesterday_revenue, 
    ROUND(
        (SUM(CASE WHEN DATE(timestamp) = DATE('2022-01-27', '-1 day') THEN amount ELSE 0 END) - 
         SUM(CASE WHEN DATE(timestamp) = DATE('2022-01-27', '-8 days') THEN amount ELSE 0 END)) * 1.0 / 
        NULLIF(SUM(CASE WHEN DATE(timestamp) = DATE('2022-01-27', '-8 days') THEN amount ELSE 0 END), 0)
    , 2) AS pct_change_week_ago, 
    SUM(CASE WHEN strftime('%Y-%m', timestamp) = strftime('%Y-%m', DATE('2022-01-27', '-1 day')) 
              AND CAST(strftime('%d', timestamp) AS INTEGER) <= CAST(strftime('%d', DATE('2022-01-27', '-1 day')) AS INTEGER)
         THEN amount ELSE 0 END) AS mtd, 
    ROUND(
        (SUM(CASE WHEN strftime('%Y-%m', timestamp) = strftime('%Y-%m', DATE('2022-01-27', '-1 day')) 
                  AND CAST(strftime('%d', timestamp) AS INTEGER) <= CAST(strftime('%d', DATE('2022-01-27', '-1 day')) AS INTEGER)
             THEN amount ELSE 0 END) - 
         SUM(CASE WHEN strftime('%Y-%m', timestamp) = strftime('%Y-%m', DATE('2022-01-27', '-1 day', '-1 month')) 
                  AND CAST(strftime('%d', timestamp) AS INTEGER) <= CAST(strftime('%d', DATE('2022-01-27', '-1 day')) AS INTEGER)
             THEN amount ELSE 0 END)) * 1.0 / 
        NULLIF(SUM(CASE WHEN strftime('%Y-%m', timestamp) = strftime('%Y-%m', DATE('2022-01-27', '-1 day', '-1 month')) 
                        AND CAST(strftime('%d', timestamp) AS INTEGER) <= CAST(strftime('%d', DATE('2022-01-27', '-1 day')) AS INTEGER)
                   THEN amount ELSE 0 END), 0)
    , 2) AS pct_change_month_prior 
FROM transactions
